title: Consultation Rationale Templates (SP15 T-7)
description: Adopter-editable templates consumed by SP15 consultation surfaces. Per surface-id: a static preamble + tradeoffs prose + citation block. Dynamic per-run data (cluster counts, confidence, alternatives) is composed inline in the consumer script and merged with these static templates at rationale-render time. Initial consumer: skills/infer-vault-structure/stage-2-5-consultation.sh (sp13-stage-2-5-import-plan). Future v2.x consultation-rationale-config-unification will retrofit surfaces 3/4/6 to the same shape.

schema_version.description: Schema version anchor. Bump on breaking shape changes.

templates.description: Map of surface-id to per-surface rationale template. Surface-ids must match entries on lib/consultation-gate.allowlist.

preamble.description: Opening prose framing what the user is being asked to ratify.

tradeoffs.description: Prose enumerating the tradeoffs the system accepted on the user's behalf.

citations.description: Research citations supporting the proposal. SP15 T-7 mandates ≥4 (Cowan-4, PARA-4, Luhmann-11, Hick's Law) per spec L40 + brief.
